# Distill ▲ Graph

> A knowledge graph of 190 reusable engineering patterns, distilled from 39 open-source repositories into 67 domains. This file is the machine-readable representation of the graph for AI agents and crawlers. The visual app at https://distill-graph.vercel.app renders the same data as an interactive star map.

## At a glance
- Patterns: 190
- Domains: 67
- Repositories: 39
- Connections: 533 (avg 5.6 per pattern)
- Source of truth: https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it
- Raw data (JSON): https://distill-graph.vercel.app/graph.json
- Visual map: https://distill-graph.vercel.app  ·  Stats/analysis: https://distill-graph.vercel.app/stats

## How to read a pattern
Each pattern has a label, a domain, a source repository, a one-line summary, a plain-language study doc, and a build spec (a self-contained reimplementation guide). Study and build links point into the distill-it repository.

## The backbone (most connected patterns, study these first)
1. Multi-Source Research Engine (14 connections) — research-automation, from last30days-skill
2. Ordered Backend Routing (14 connections) — agent-architecture, from agent-reach
3. Agentic Loop (14 connections) — ai-workflow, from open-design
4. Scrape Engine + Fallback Pipeline (13 connections) — web-extraction, from firecrawl
5. Converter Pipeline (12 connections) — document-conversion, from markitdown
6. Reactive Store Architecture (12 connections) — state-management, from xyflow

## Foundations (most depended-upon, highest-leverage to reuse)
- Reactive Store Architecture (5 patterns depend on it) — from xyflow
- Email Provider Abstraction (4 patterns depend on it) — from inbox-zero
- Graph Execution Engine (4 patterns depend on it) — from scrapegraph-ai
- Cloudflare Worker API-Key Proxy (4 patterns depend on it) — from clicky
- PDF Ingestion Pipeline (4 patterns depend on it) — from openpaper
- Scrape Engine + Fallback Pipeline (4 patterns depend on it) — from firecrawl

## Patterns by domain

### Ai Integration (11)
Wiring external AI services (cloud OCR, LLM vision, speech recognition, provider-agnostic LLM SDKs) into a product — as enhancement layers in a pipeline, or as the swappable engine a whole tool is built on.

- **Provider-Agnostic LLM Layer** — from llm-scraper. Multi-provider (OpenAI/Anthropic/Google/Groq/Ollama) with zero per-provider code by depending on the Vercel AI SDK LanguageModel abstraction. Constructor takes one model handle; provider chosen by caller. Lesson: abstract one level above the vendor.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/study/provider-agnostic-llm--from-llm-scraper.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/build/provider-agnostic-llm--from-llm-scraper.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/mishushakov/llm-scraper)

- **Citation-Grounded Chat** — from openpaper. RAG chat that answers ONLY from pre-extracted evidence and tags every claim with inline @cite[n]/@cite[n|paper_id] markers, parsed back into source-anchored footnotes. No-embeddings word-overlap re-anchor for compacted summaries; delimiter-framed JSON streaming.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/study/citation-grounded-chat--from-openpaper.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/build/citation-grounded-chat--from-openpaper.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/khoj-ai/openpaper)

- **AI Agent with Tool Calling** — from asyar. full multi-provider AI agent (OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini/Ollama/OpenRouter) with 3-tier tool registry (builtin/extension/MCP), streaming via Tauri events, agentic loop with tool-call rounds, and a provider-abstraction layer normalizing all vendor APIs
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/study/ai-agent-tool-calling--from-asyar.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/build/ai-agent-tool-calling--from-asyar.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/Xoshbin/asyar)

- **Multi-Provider LLM System** — from bolt-diy. Singleton LLMManager auto-discovers BaseProvider subclasses, caches static+dynamic model lists, and exposes a unified getModelInstance() interface. API keys travel in cookies. 19+ providers via Vercel AI SDK. Framework-detection-free — just implement BaseProvider and register.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/study/multi-provider-llm--from-bolt-diy.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/build/multi-provider-llm--from-bolt-diy.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/stackblitz-labs/bolt.diy)

- **Azure Doc Intelligence** — from markitdown. Azure prebuilt-layout model for OCR-grade extraction of PDFs, images, Office files. Submits bytes, gets native Markdown back, strips HTML comments. OCR features (high-res, formulas, fonts) enabled only for PDF/image types.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/study/azure-doc-intelligence--from-markitdown.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/build/azure-doc-intelligence--from-markitdown.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/microsoft/markitdown)

- **Provider-Agnostic Model Layer** — from scrapegraph-ai. '<provider>/<model>' string -> client across ~19 providers via LangChain init_chat_model + bespoke wrappers. Resolves max-input-tokens (model_token) that sizes chunking. model_instance escape hatch; optional InMemoryRateLimiter.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/study/provider-agnostic-model-layer--from-scrapegraph-ai.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/build/provider-agnostic-model-layer--from-scrapegraph-ai.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/ScrapeGraphAI/Scrapegraph-ai)

- **Context Optimization** — from bolt-diy. Two pre-turn LLM calls: createSummary() collapses old history into structured project summary; selectContext() picks ≤5 relevant files via AI outputting <includeFile>/<excludeFile> XML. Both emit SSE progress events. Gitignore-style file filtering. Optional per-request feature flag.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/study/context-optimization--from-bolt-diy.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/build/context-optimization--from-bolt-diy.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/stackblitz-labs/bolt.diy)

- **Multi-Provider Model Gateway** — from scira. One scira-* alias per model; a single customProvider maps each alias to a real call (direct, retryable-with-fallback, gateway-brokered, or custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint). ~130 models / 22 providers. Client-safe metadata registry split from secret-bearing wiring.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/study/multi-provider-model-gateway--from-scira.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/build/multi-provider-model-gateway--from-scira.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/zaidmukaddam/scira)

- **AI Lead Classification (Claude)** — from auto-crm. Optional Claude Sonnet lead grader -> strict JSON {temperature, confidence, nextAction, reasoning} in Spanish. Null-client-as-feature-flag, regex {...} JSON extraction, total silent fallback to the rule-based scorer. Same write contract.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/study/ai-lead-classification--from-auto-crm.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/build/ai-lead-classification--from-auto-crm.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/Hainrixz/auto-crm)

- **Streaming Claude Screen Context** — from clicky. Sends base64 screenshots plus a transcribed question to Claude (claude-sonnet-4-6, stream:true) through a Cloudflare Worker proxy, parsing SSE content_block_delta/text_delta events and emitting cumulative text to a @MainActor callback for progressive UI. Includes media-type sniffing and a TLS warm-up to survive large image payloads.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/study/streaming-claude-screen-context--from-clicky.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/build/streaming-claude-screen-context--from-clicky.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/farzaa/clicky)

- **MCP Integration** — from dyad. Model Context Protocol client manager: SQLite-backed server configs, per-tool consent tracking, 8s tool listing timeout with forced dispose, OAuth discovery+PKCE flow, error classification (discovery_failed vs unauthorized) for actionable UI messages.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/study/mcp-integration--from-dyad.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-integration/build/mcp-integration--from-dyad.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/dyad-sh/dyad)

### Web Extraction (11)
Turning web resources — HTML pages, YouTube videos, RSS feeds, Wikipedia articles — into clean Markdown by combining HTTP fetching, DOM parsing, and platform-specific API calls.

- **Scrape Engine + Fallback Pipeline** — from firecrawl. URL -> clean output (md/html/screenshot/links/json) via a capability-driven engine fallback chain (fetch -> playwright -> fire-engine chrome-cdp/tlsclient with stealth/retry -> pdf) chosen by feature flags, then a fixed transformer stack. maxAge index cache for low latency.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/study/scrape-engine-fallback-pipeline--from-firecrawl.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/build/scrape-engine-fallback-pipeline--from-firecrawl.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl)

- **Web Search (+ optional scrape)** — from firecrawl. Query a search provider (fire-engine -> SearXNG -> DuckDuckGo fallback) returning normalized web/news/images, then optionally scrape every result concurrently through the same scrape pipeline (3-day cache) and merge content back by URL. Soft-fails; search bills search credits, scrapes self-bill; keyless reserve/reconcile.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/study/web-search-with-scrape--from-firecrawl.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/build/web-search-with-scrape--from-firecrawl.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl)

- **Site URL Map** — from firecrawl. Fast URL discovery for a domain (no page scrape): merge sitemap.xml + fire-engine index (<=100, cached per-URL), dedup, filter by subdomain/external/limit, and optionally rerank by embedding cosine similarity against a search query. Seconds, not a crawl.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/study/site-url-map--from-firecrawl.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/build/site-url-map--from-firecrawl.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl)

- **Declarative HTTP Stream Stack** — from airbyte. Four swappable components + a retriever loop pull records from a REST API: HttpRequester (interpolated url/params + error-handler/backoff) -> DefaultPaginator (strategy computes next token; option says where to inject) -> DpathExtractor (field_path into JSON; [] = whole response) -> RecordSelector (filter+normalize+transform). SimpleRetriever loops until token is None.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/study/declarative-http-stream-stack--from-airbyte.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/build/declarative-http-stream-stack--from-airbyte.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/airbytehq/airbyte)

- **SmartScraper Pipeline** — from scrapegraph-ai. Flagship: prompt + URL -> structured answer as a 3-node pipeline (Fetch->Parse->GenerateAnswer). 8 variants selected by (html_mode, reasoning, reattempt) flags via a lookup table over the same nodes. reattempt adds a conditional+regenerate self-healing retry loop.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/study/smart-scraper-pipeline--from-scrapegraph-ai.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/build/smart-scraper-pipeline--from-scrapegraph-ai.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/ScrapeGraphAI/Scrapegraph-ai)

- **Corpus & Academic Search** — from openpaper. Two separate search subsystems: knowledge-base ILIKE substring scan over papers+highlights+annotations (recency-ranked, no embeddings) and external OpenAlex discovery (filters/sort + inverted-index abstract rebuild); Exa is agent-only. Plus 3-pass metadata hydration (DOI resolve -> enrich -> agentic fallback).
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/study/corpus-and-academic-search--from-openpaper.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/build/corpus-and-academic-search--from-openpaper.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/khoj-ai/openpaper)

- **Agentic Browser Actions** — from firecrawl. An AI agent drives a hosted browser to satisfy a natural-language instruction (click/scroll/type/wait) before capture, returning post-interaction HTML/markdown. A scrape-pipeline transformer (performAgent) calling fire-engine smart-scrape; tiered Gemini models, cost-capped soft-fail, disabled under ZDR.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/study/agentic-browser-actions--from-firecrawl.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/build/agentic-browser-actions--from-firecrawl.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl)

- **Multi-Source Fetch Node** — from scrapegraph-ai. Input normalization: URL (Chromium/requests/BrowserBase/Scrape.do) or local HTML/PDF/CSV/JSON/XML/MD/dir -> list[Document]. HTML->Markdown gated on OpenAI-family models. storage_state for authenticated scraping. Blank-page guard.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/study/multi-source-fetch-node--from-scrapegraph-ai.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/build/multi-source-fetch-node--from-scrapegraph-ai.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/ScrapeGraphAI/Scrapegraph-ai)

- **HTML Web Conversion** — from markitdown. BeautifulSoup + custom markdownify subclass. Strips scripts/styles, extracts body, RecursionError fallback to plaintext. convert_string() helper used by DOCX/PPTX/XLSX for table rendering. Wikipedia/RSS/Bing specializations.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/study/html-web-conversion--from-markitdown.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/build/html-web-conversion--from-markitdown.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/microsoft/markitdown)

- **Browser Design Token Extraction** — from ai-website-cloner-template. getComputedStyle() on every DOM element via page.evaluate() in headless Chromium to extract final resolved CSS values. Frequency analysis reveals the design system. Interaction states captured via pseudo-class injection. Responsive variants by viewport resize. Colors converted to oklch for Tailwind v4.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/study/browser-design-token-extraction--from-ai-website-cloner-template.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/build/browser-design-token-extraction--from-ai-website-cloner-template.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template)

- **YouTube Extraction** — from markitdown. YouTube watch URL → Markdown. Meta tag scrape for views/keywords/duration. Recursive ytInitialData JSON search for description. youtube_transcript_api with 3-retry logic for transcript.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/study/youtube-extraction--from-markitdown.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/web-extraction/build/youtube-extraction--from-markitdown.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/microsoft/markitdown)

### Agent Architecture (10)
separating prose contracts from executable engines, enforcing output consistency across harnesses, and designing for cross-platform compatibility.

- **Ordered Backend Routing** — from agent-reach. Each capability is a Channel with an ORDERED backends list (preferred→fallbacks). Two-phase check: collect all candidates, first `ok` wins, then first `warn` — so an installed-but-logged-out backend can't mask a working fallback. active_backend records the live one. User pin via <name>_backend (unknown value ignored). Switching backend = reorder a list, not code.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/agent-architecture/study/ordered-backend-routing--from-agent-reach.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/agent-architecture/build/ordered-backend-routing--from-agent-reach.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach)

- **Agent Output Contract** — from last30days-skill. 5-law output contract enforced via SKILL.md prompt text: no Sources block, no invented headers, space-dash-space separators, no ## inside body sections, verbatim footer passthrough. Zero runtime validation.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/agent-architecture/study/agent-output-contract--from-last30days-skill.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/agent-architecture/build/agent-output-contract--from-last30days-skill.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/mvanhorn/last30days-skill)

- **MCP CRM Server** — from auto-crm. Exposes a local SQLite CRM to Claude as 10 stdio MCP tools (contacts/deals/activities/pipeline/followups/stats) over better-sqlite3 (WAL, FKs). Read-tools pre-aggregate; no auth (stdio local-only); shares the live DB with the web app.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/agent-architecture/study/mcp-crm-server--from-auto-crm.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/agent-architecture/build/mcp-crm-server--from-auto-crm.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/Hainrixz/auto-crm)

- **Per-Contact Conversation Memory** — from whatsapp-agentkit. Minimal async chat memory: one SQLAlchemy table keyed+indexed on phone number, stores user/assistant turns, reads last-N newest-first then reverses to chronological, returns LLM-shaped {role,content} dicts. SQLite local / Postgres prod via one env var (auto-rewrites to asyncpg). Window cap is the only cost control; fetch-before-save avoids duplicating the current turn.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/agent-architecture/study/conversation-memory--from-whatsapp-agentkit.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/agent-architecture/build/conversation-memory--from-whatsapp-agentkit.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/Hainrixz/whatsapp-agentkit)

- **MCP Sidecar Auto-Detection** — from asyar. scans Claude Desktop, Cursor, Cline, Continue, and Zed config files to auto-import MCP server definitions; rewrites npx→bundled bun and uvx→bundled uv; manages stdio subprocesses with exponential-backoff restart and namespaces tools as mcp__slug__name
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/agent-architecture/study/mcp-sidecar-auto-detection--from-asyar.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/agent-architecture/build/mcp-sidecar-auto-detection--from-asyar.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/Xoshbin/asyar)

- **Agents as Teammates** — from multica. Actor polymorphism: every authored/assigned/addressed row stores (*_type member|agent, *_id) so an agent creates issues, comments, gets assigned, and hits the inbox like a human. A "blocker" is emergent (agent status + issue status + action_required inbox + comment), not a table.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/agent-architecture/study/agents-as-teammates--from-multica.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/agent-architecture/build/agents-as-teammates--from-multica.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/multica-ai/multica)

- **Tool & Search-Mode Registry** — from scira. Scope an LLM's tools per mode: two parallel maps (mode->tool-name[] and mode->systemPrompt). Resolver gates access and silently degrades gated modes to web. Tools are factories (close over runtime config); names resolved to objects at call site. 18 modes, ~30 tools.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/agent-architecture/study/tool-and-search-mode-registry--from-scira.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/agent-architecture/build/tool-and-search-mode-registry--from-scira.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/zaidmukaddam/scira)

- **Autonomous Execution Lifecycle + WS Streaming** — from multica. agent_task_queue state machine (queued->dispatched->running->completed|failed|cancelled) across server+daemon. WS dispatch is a wakeup HINT; daemon claims via transactional HTTP. Typed, seq-numbered transcript events (text/tool_use/tool_result/error) over one multiplexed socket.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/agent-architecture/study/autonomous-execution-lifecycle--from-multica.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/agent-architecture/build/autonomous-execution-lifecycle--from-multica.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/multica-ai/multica)

- **Agentic Video-Understanding Pipeline (/watch)** — from claude-video. Skill that gives an agent a video 'sense' without a video model: orchestrator turns video into timestamped frames + transcript, prints a markdown report of frame paths; the agent Reads the images and answers. Modalities aligned on a shared timestamp clock; delivered via a 5-step SKILL.md contract with graceful degradation everywhere.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/agent-architecture/study/agentic-video-understanding-pipeline--from-claude-video.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/agent-architecture/build/agentic-video-understanding-pipeline--from-claude-video.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/bradautomates/claude-video)

- **MCP Tool Integration** — from bolt-diy. MCPService singleton connects to MCP servers via SSEClientTransport, lists tools via client.listTools(), injects definitions into system prompt, and routes LLM tool calls to executeTool(). Config arrives per-request; connections cached in singleton. SSE-only in browser (no stdio).
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/agent-architecture/study/mcp-tool-integration--from-bolt-diy.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/agent-architecture/build/mcp-tool-integration--from-bolt-diy.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/stackblitz-labs/bolt.diy)

### Pipeline Orchestration (9)
Composing a unit of work as a graph of small, single-purpose nodes that pass a shared mutable state dictionary between them — a deterministic "blackboard" pipeline rather than an autonomous agent loop.

- **Queue-Backed Crawl** — from firecrawl. Recursive site crawl on BullMQ + Redis state: one kickoff job seeds the frontier (sitemap + start page), each scrape job extracts links and enqueues children, dedup via atomic Redis SADD (lockURL). Done = jobs==jobs_done AND kickoff done AND sitemap done. Status pages a ZSET; WS streams; per-team concurrency.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/pipeline-orchestration/study/queue-backed-crawl--from-firecrawl.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/pipeline-orchestration/build/queue-backed-crawl--from-firecrawl.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl)

- **Declarative (Low-Code) CDK** — from airbyte. Define a whole connector in a YAML manifest (instance of a component JSON-schema); a runtime interprets it: resolve $refs -> propagate $parameters -> validate -> ModelToComponentFactory builds live components. One manifest runs on a sync or concurrent engine (worker count declared). Normalization+migration keep old manifests working.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/pipeline-orchestration/study/declarative-low-code-cdk--from-airbyte.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/pipeline-orchestration/build/declarative-low-code-cdk--from-airbyte.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/airbytehq/airbyte)

- **Incremental Sync & State** — from airbyte. Cursor-based incremental reads: DatetimeBasedCursor slices [start-lookback,end] into step windows -> one stream_slice per window (injected via interpolation), observes each record's cursor_field tracking the MAX, and emits state {cursor_field: highest} at slice boundaries so the next run resumes. Lookback catches late updates; destinations dedup on PK.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/pipeline-orchestration/study/incremental-sync-state--from-airbyte.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/pipeline-orchestration/build/incremental-sync-state--from-airbyte.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/airbytehq/airbyte)

- **Query Processor Middleware Pipeline** — from metabase. Three-phase engine: preprocess threads the MBQL query through ~40 query->query middleware (normalize, validate, resolve joins, permissions/sandboxing, params, desugar, default limit); compile via driver mbql->native; execute as a reducible streaming rows through a reducing-fn (rff) with cooperative cancellation; postprocess threads rows through reducing-fn middleware (format/limit/annotate). Built once by reduce; hot-reloaded.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/pipeline-orchestration/study/query-processor-middleware-pipeline--from-metabase.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/pipeline-orchestration/build/query-processor-middleware-pipeline--from-metabase.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/metabase/metabase)

- **Autopilot — Scheduled Agent Work** — from multica. Recurring agent work via cron/webhook/api on a generic DB-backed distributed-lock scheduler (sys_cron_executions): unique (job,scope,plan_time) is both the lock and the audit log; N instances tick safely, one wins each plan. 3 tables: autopilot/trigger/run.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/pipeline-orchestration/study/autopilot-scheduled-work--from-multica.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/pipeline-orchestration/build/autopilot-scheduled-work--from-multica.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/multica-ai/multica)

- **Graph Execution Engine** — from scrapegraph-ai. ~100-line node/edge engine: nodes pass a shared mutable state dict, traversed from an entry point. Conditional nodes return the next node name (branch/retry). Per-node token/cost accounting. Boolean input-key DSL declares each node's data deps.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/pipeline-orchestration/study/graph-execution-engine--from-scrapegraph-ai.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/pipeline-orchestration/build/graph-execution-engine--from-scrapegraph-ai.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/ScrapeGraphAI/Scrapegraph-ai)

- **File Rules Engine** — from hazelnut. Condition->action rules over file paths. A Condition is an all-optional struct matched by AND (extension(s), glob/regex name, size >/<, age-days >/<, is_directory, is_hidden; empty=all). Engine evaluates ordered enable-able rules (first/all/filtered-by-name, stop_processing) and executes actions, stopping after a destructive one. Perf: one metadata syscall for size+age; thread-local cap-1000 glob/regex caches.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/pipeline-orchestration/study/file-rules-engine--from-hazelnut.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/pipeline-orchestration/build/file-rules-engine--from-hazelnut.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/ricardodantas/hazelnut)

- **File Actions Executor** — from hazelnut. A tagged Action enum with per-variant execute(path): Move/Copy (~-expanded dest, opt create_destination, overwrite-guarded), Rename (pattern {name}{ext}{date}), Trash (recoverable) vs Delete (permanent), Archive (zip), RunScript (placeholder {path}{name}{dir} -> platform shell). Move/rename/trash/delete are destructive and stop the chain.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/pipeline-orchestration/study/file-actions-executor--from-hazelnut.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/pipeline-orchestration/build/file-actions-executor--from-hazelnut.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/ricardodantas/hazelnut)

- **Scheduled Monitoring Agents (Lookouts)** — from scira. Cron-scheduled research agent on QStash. One route does CRUD + the cron callback (disambiguated by signature header). Each fire runs the existing research pipeline, persists a browsable chat, appends a runHistory JSON entry, emails the result. Cron stored UTC, timezone separate.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/pipeline-orchestration/study/scheduled-monitoring-agents--from-scira.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/pipeline-orchestration/build/scheduled-monitoring-agents--from-scira.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/zaidmukaddam/scira)

### Plugin Architecture (8)
Patterns for making a library extensible by third parties without modifying the core package — whether via Python entry-point discovery (markitdown) or an in-process, name-keyed hook registry (style-dictionary).

- **Register / Extensibility API** — from style-dictionary. Eight-bucket in-process hook registry (transforms, transformGroups, formats, filters, actions, parsers, preprocessors, fileHeaders). Static (class-level) vs instance (_hooks) scopes deepmerged on read; per-type validation; string-name indirection from config to plugin; silent overwrite on collision.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/plugin-architecture/study/register-extensibility-api--from-style-dictionary.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/plugin-architecture/build/register-extensibility-api--from-style-dictionary.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/style-dictionary/style-dictionary)

- **Multimethod Driver Abstraction** — from metabase. One interface, N databases via Clojure multimethods + an isa? hierarchy. Drivers register! with a parent (:postgres->:sql-jdbc->:sql); multimethods (mbql->native, execute-reducible-query, describe-*, database-supports?) dispatch on the driver keyword and fall through the hierarchy. SQL DBs inherit one shared MBQL->HoneySQL->string compiler (per-[driver,clause] ->honeysql multimethods) and override only dialect quirks.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/plugin-architecture/study/multimethod-driver-abstraction--from-metabase.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/plugin-architecture/build/multimethod-driver-abstraction--from-metabase.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/metabase/metabase)

- **Sandboxed Extension System** — from asyar. iframe-sandboxed extension runtime with postMessage bridge, dual-layer permission enforcement (TS frontend + Rust backend), TypeScript SDK with Commander CLI scaffolding, and Chokidar hot-reload in dev mode
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/plugin-architecture/study/sandboxed-extension-system--from-asyar.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/plugin-architecture/build/sandboxed-extension-system--from-asyar.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/Xoshbin/asyar)

- **Plugin System** — from markitdown. importlib.metadata entry_points discovery under group 'markitdown.plugin'. Lazy load with fault isolation. register_converters(host, **kwargs) callback pattern. __plugin_interface_version__ for forward compat.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/plugin-architecture/study/plugin-system--from-markitdown.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/plugin-architecture/build/plugin-system--from-markitdown.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/microsoft/markitdown)

- **Skills System** — from open-design. SKILL.md = minimal YAML frontmatter + markdown instructions. adaptAgentSkill() converts to PluginManifest via 3-layer merge (sidecar>adapter>fallback). SHA-256 digest for reproducibility. Pure-TS runtime (no Node imports) runs in daemon/browser/CI.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/plugin-architecture/study/skills-system--from-open-design.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/plugin-architecture/build/skills-system--from-open-design.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/nexu-io/open-design)

- **Plugin Ecosystem** — from open-design. 3-tier discovery: official (bundled), community (registry), user custom (local drop-in). 22+ agent CLI adapters (one object: bin/versionArgs/buildArgs/streamFormat). Agent execution via stdio child processes. Sidecar open-design.json for highest-priority overrides.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/plugin-architecture/study/plugin-ecosystem--from-open-design.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/plugin-architecture/build/plugin-ecosystem--from-open-design.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/nexu-io/open-design)

- **Capability-Based Module System** — from vlc. Runtime capability registry where every subsystem (codec, output, UI, network) is a module declaring (capability_string, priority_score). module_need() collects, sorts by score, tries in order, returns first success. Enables hardware-acceleration fallback, platform isolation, and third-party plugins with zero core changes.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/plugin-architecture/study/capability-module-system--from-vlc.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/plugin-architecture/build/capability-module-system--from-vlc.md) · [origin repo](https://code.videolan.org/videolan/vlc)

- **Multi-Platform Agent Sync** — from ai-website-cloner-template. AGENTS.md as single source of truth for project instructions. sync-agent-rules.sh generates 11+ platform copies (CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, .cursor/rules/, .github/copilot-instructions.md, etc.). sync-skills.mjs propagates skill definitions. Generated files carry DO NOT EDIT headers and are committed to git.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/plugin-architecture/study/multi-platform-agent-sync--from-ai-website-cloner-template.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/plugin-architecture/build/multi-platform-agent-sync--from-ai-website-cloner-template.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template)

### Canvas Interaction (7)
panning, zooming, dragging objects across it, and navigating it from an overview map. The shared problem is mapping between screen pixels and flow/world coordinates through a viewport transform [x, y, zoom].

- **PDF Highlights & Annotations** — from openpaper. Anchored PDF highlights storing raw_text + a zoom-invariant scaled-rects position blob (react-pdf-highlighter style), notes attached to highlights, one paper-note per paper. Role-stamped user/assistant (assistant rows immutable); zotero_annotation_key partial-unique index makes Zotero import idempotent.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/canvas-interaction/study/pdf-highlights-annotations--from-openpaper.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/canvas-interaction/build/pdf-highlights-annotations--from-openpaper.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/khoj-ai/openpaper)

- **Pan & Zoom Canvas** — from xyflow. Infinite pannable/zoomable viewport wrapping d3-zoom. Single [x,y,zoom] transform; factory exposes setViewport/scaleTo/syncViewport; a per-render filter encodes all product rules (pan-on-drag, activation keys, no-pan zones, pan-on-scroll).
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/canvas-interaction/study/pan-zoom-canvas--from-xyflow.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/canvas-interaction/build/pan-zoom-canvas--from-xyflow.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/xyflow/xyflow)

- **Node Dragging** — from xyflow. d3-drag node movement: multi-select moves as rigid group, group-snaps as a unit, screen-space drag threshold, extent clamp, and rAF edge auto-pan that re-derives position from a stored last pointer.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/canvas-interaction/study/node-dragging--from-xyflow.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/canvas-interaction/build/node-dragging--from-xyflow.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/xyflow/xyflow)

- **Minimap Navigation** — from xyflow. Overview panel that is a remote control for the main viewport (not a 2nd viewport). d3-zoom on the mini SVG as a gesture recognizer; deltas scaled by minimap-shrink x main-zoom feed setViewportConstrained/scaleTo.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/canvas-interaction/study/minimap-navigation--from-xyflow.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/canvas-interaction/build/minimap-navigation--from-xyflow.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/xyflow/xyflow)

- **Kanban Pipeline (drag-and-drop)** — from auto-crm. @dnd-kit sales pipeline board. Optimistic update with full-board snapshot rollback: snapshot on drag start, move in onDragOver, PUT /api/pipeline on drop, restore+toast on failure. 8px activation, closestCorners, DragOverlay.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/canvas-interaction/study/kanban-pipeline-dnd--from-auto-crm.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/canvas-interaction/build/kanban-pipeline-dnd--from-auto-crm.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/Hainrixz/auto-crm)

- **Screen Element Localization** — from clicky. Finds the on-screen pixel of a UI element: resizes a screenshot to the aspect-ratio-nearest Anthropic Computer Use resolution (1024x768/1280x800/1366x768) via exact-pixel NSBitmapImageRep, POSTs to Claude with the computer tool + beta header, parses the tool_use coordinate, then clamps, scales to display points, and flips Y to AppKit's bottom-left origin. Returns a display-local CGPoint or nil.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/canvas-interaction/study/screen-element-localization--from-clicky.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/canvas-interaction/build/screen-element-localization--from-clicky.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/farzaa/clicky)

- **Animated Pointer Guidance** — from clicky. A transparent, click-through, never-key NSWindow per display hosts a SwiftUI blue-triangle buddy that springs behind the mouse, then flies to a detected element along a timer-driven quadratic Bezier arc (smoothstep easing, tangent rotation, sine scale-pulse) before pointing and returning. Multi-monitor routing via CompanionManager's globalized CGPoint.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/canvas-interaction/study/animated-pointer-guidance--from-clicky.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/canvas-interaction/build/animated-pointer-guidance--from-clicky.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/farzaa/clicky)

### Media Processing (7)
Extracting text, metadata, and AI-generated descriptions from binary media files (images, audio) for use in text pipelines.

- **Screen Capture with Self-Exclusion** — from clicky. ScreenCaptureKit single-frame capture of every display that excludes all of the app's own windows (matched by bundle id) so the AI never sees its own overlays; returns cursor-screen-first labeled JPEGs and fixes the CG-vs-AppKit coordinate mismatch for multi-monitor cursor detection.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/media-processing/study/screen-capture-self-exclusion--from-clicky.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/media-processing/build/screen-capture-self-exclusion--from-clicky.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/farzaa/clicky)

- **Image + LLM Captioning** — from markitdown. JPEG/PNG converter with two optional layers: exiftool subprocess for EXIF metadata, OpenAI-compatible vision API for image description. Both independently optional. Output: key-values + ## Description.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/media-processing/study/image-llm-captioning--from-markitdown.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/media-processing/build/image-llm-captioning--from-markitdown.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/microsoft/markitdown)

- **Push-to-Talk Streaming Transcription** — from clicky. Global modifier-only hotkey (ctrl+option) via a listen-only CGEvent tap drives AVAudioEngine push-to-talk into a pluggable transcription provider; default AssemblyAI v3 streams 16kHz PCM16 over WebSocket with ordered turn-stitching, with Apple Speech and OpenAI as config-selected fallbacks.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/media-processing/study/push-to-talk-streaming-transcription--from-clicky.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/media-processing/build/push-to-talk-streaming-transcription--from-clicky.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/farzaa/clicky)

- **Audio Transcription** — from markitdown. WAV/MP3/M4A/MP4 → Markdown via speech_recognition (Google Web Speech API) + exiftool metadata. Duration excluded (wrong from memory stream). Temp file needed for non-WAV formats.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/media-processing/study/audio-transcription--from-markitdown.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/media-processing/build/audio-transcription--from-markitdown.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/microsoft/markitdown)

- **Media Pipeline** — from vlc. Multi-stage runtime-assembled pipeline: MRL parse → access (bytes) → stream filters → demux (container/packets) → decoder threads (compressed→raw) → vout/aout (render). Input thread drives a main loop with control queue (seek, pause, rate). All stages swappable modules; timeshift buffer optional between demux and decoders.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/media-processing/study/media-pipeline--from-vlc.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/media-processing/build/media-pipeline--from-vlc.md) · [origin repo](https://code.videolan.org/videolan/vlc)

- **Duration-Aware Frame Budgeting** — from claude-video. Frame COUNT budgeted by video duration (short=dense w/ 12-frame floor, long capped at 100), fps back-derived as count/duration and hard-clamped to 2fps. Separate denser tier table for --start/--end focus mode. ffmpeg extract returns absolute per-frame timestamps.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/media-processing/study/duration-aware-frame-budgeting--from-claude-video.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/media-processing/build/duration-aware-frame-budgeting--from-claude-video.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/bradautomates/claude-video)

- **libVLC Embeddable Engine** — from vlc. LGPL C library wrapping VLC's full multimedia engine. API: libvlc_new(args) → libvlc_media_new_location(url) → libvlc_media_player_new() → set_xwindow/hwnd/nsobject() → play(). Event system fires on internal thread; state machine covers Opening/Buffering/Playing/Paused/Ended/Error. Bindings for C++, Python, C#, Java, Swift.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/media-processing/study/libvlc-embeddable-engine--from-vlc.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/media-processing/build/libvlc-embeddable-engine--from-vlc.md) · [origin repo](https://code.videolan.org/videolan/vlc)

### Credential Management (6)
Patterns for managing multi-tier authentication in tools that aggregate from heterogeneous sources — keyless public APIs, browser-cookie sessions, and paid API keys — with graceful degradation when credentials are absent.

- **Keyless & x402 Paid Access** — from firecrawl. Two account-less tiers over the same metering. Keyless: IP -> synthetic team preview_keyless_{ip}, two env-gated daily limits (off unless both set), reserve-then-reconcile credits in Redis, agent-aware 429. x402: HTTP-402 pay-per-call via @x402/express EVM exact scheme settled by a facilitator on a configurable network.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/credential-management/study/keyless-and-x402-access--from-firecrawl.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/credential-management/build/keyless-and-x402-access--from-firecrawl.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl)

- **Multi-Tier Credentials** — from last30days-skill. Tier 1 keyless (Reddit/HN/Polymarket/GitHub), Tier 2 browser cookies (X via Bird/Chrome/Safari/xurl, YouTube via yt-dlp/SSH), Tier 3 API keys (.env dual hierarchy, perms 600). Preflight startup checks.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/credential-management/study/multi-tier-credentials--from-last30days-skill.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/credential-management/build/multi-tier-credentials--from-last30days-skill.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/mvanhorn/last30days-skill)

- **Multi-Path Authentication** — from openpaper. Three auth paths over opaque server-side session tokens (NOT JWT): Google OAuth2, email 6-digit code, and Zotero OAuth 1.0a (library link, not login). 64-char token in a sessions table, httpOnly cookie or Bearer. Refuse-don't-merge cross-provider; several documented security gaps (unverified state, plaintext codes).
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/credential-management/study/multi-path-auth--from-openpaper.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/credential-management/build/multi-path-auth--from-openpaper.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/khoj-ai/openpaper)

- **Cookie Credential Extraction** — from agent-reach. Multi-browser cookie harvest (rookiepy→browser_cookie3) driven by declarative per-platform specs (named cookies vs whole Cookie-header). Validate-before-save: require a logged-in marker (auth_token+ct0, xq_a_token) — presence≠valid. Atomic 0o600 write (O_CREAT+mode, no write-then-chmod race). shlex-quoted best-effort mirrors into upstream tools' credential files.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/credential-management/study/cookie-credential-extraction--from-agent-reach.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/credential-management/build/cookie-credential-extraction--from-agent-reach.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach)

- **Cloudflare Worker API-Key Proxy** — from clicky. A single-file Cloudflare Worker that keeps Anthropic, ElevenLabs, and AssemblyAI keys server-side as Worker secrets, exposing three POST routes — /chat (Claude Messages SSE pass-through), /tts (ElevenLabs MP3 stream), and /transcribe-token (short-lived AssemblyAI token broker). Streams upstream Response.body directly; no CORS, client auth, or rate-limiting.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/credential-management/study/cloudflare-worker-key-proxy--from-clicky.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/credential-management/build/cloudflare-worker-key-proxy--from-clicky.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/farzaa/clicky)

- **BYOK Settings** — from dyad. Bring-your-own-keys settings system: atomic JSON write (temp+rename), Electron safeStorage encryption for all secrets (API keys, tokens, service accounts), effective settings merge with defaults, unlogged IPC handlers, custom AI provider CRUD in SQLite.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/credential-management/study/byok-settings--from-dyad.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/credential-management/build/byok-settings--from-dyad.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/dyad-sh/dyad)

### Design Systems (6)
Systems for defining brand-grade design decisions — typography, color, components, elevation, spacing, design tokens — once, in a single source of truth, then propagating them consistently to every consumer.

- **Token Pipeline Orchestration** — from style-dictionary. End-to-end build engine: load+deep-merge tokens, keep 3 synced representations, then per-platform transform↔resolve convergence loop → filter → format → write. structuredClone-isolated platforms run concurrently; abstracted FS runs in browser or Node.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/design-systems/study/token-pipeline-orchestration--from-style-dictionary.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/design-systems/build/token-pipeline-orchestration--from-style-dictionary.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/style-dictionary/style-dictionary)

- **Transforms & Transform Groups** — from style-dictionary. Composable name/value/attribute transforms with optional filter; CTI (category/type/item) attribute convention; ordered per-platform groups (css/scss/js/ios/android/flutter/...); `transitive` flag runs value transforms after ref resolution; undefined return = defer.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/design-systems/study/transforms-and-transform-groups--from-style-dictionary.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/design-systems/build/transforms-and-transform-groups--from-style-dictionary.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/style-dictionary/style-dictionary)

- **Design Systems Library** — from open-design. 150 DESIGN.md files with fixed 9-section schema (Visual Theme, Colors, Typography, Components, Layout, Elevation, Dos/Donts, Responsive, Agent Guide). Zero-config directory scan. Skills can filter to specific sections to reduce context bloat.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/design-systems/study/design-systems-library--from-open-design.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/design-systems/build/design-systems-library--from-open-design.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/nexu-io/open-design)

- **Reference Resolution Engine** — from style-dictionary. Resolves {token.path} aliases across the token graph: regex {([^}]+)}, dot-separated paths, transitive chains, multi-ref strings, object refs, number-type preservation, stack-based cycle detection, and conditional outputReferences (keep refs only when safe).
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/design-systems/study/reference-resolution-engine--from-style-dictionary.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/design-systems/build/reference-resolution-engine--from-style-dictionary.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/style-dictionary/style-dictionary)

- **OKLCH Theme Palettes** — from carousel-generator. DaisyUI-style named themes reduced to a 3-color runtime palette. Derives a readable foreground from any base color by interpolating toward black/white in OKLCH (direction by WCAG isDark) via culori. Hex/OKLCH inputs interchangeable.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/design-systems/study/oklch-theme-palettes--from-carousel-generator.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/design-systems/build/oklch-theme-palettes--from-carousel-generator.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/FranciscoMoretti/carousel-generator)

- **Native Design Tokens** — from penpot. Typed tokens (color/spacing/shadow/typography...) in ordered token sets; themes select which sets are active. Resolved view = merge active sets in global order (later overrides earlier) then resolve {path} references. All token edits ride the file change/undo system.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/design-systems/study/native-design-tokens--from-penpot.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/design-systems/build/native-design-tokens--from-penpot.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/penpot/penpot)

### Research Automation (6)
parallel multi-source retrieval, entity resolution before search, engagement-based ranking, and graceful degradation when sources fail.

- **Multi-Source Research Engine** — from last30days-skill. ThreadPoolExecutor fan-out to 6–20 sources. Depth tiers (quick/default/deep) cap source count. 2-phase retrieval with 5xx retry. Unified Report schema. Five emit formats (compact/json/context/md/html).
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/research-automation/study/multi-source-research-engine--from-last30days-skill.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/research-automation/build/multi-source-research-engine--from-last30days-skill.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/mvanhorn/last30days-skill)

- **Deep Research Loop** — from firecrawl. Autonomous depth-bounded research: from a topic (no URLs), loop generate-queries -> search+scrape -> record sources -> analyze -> pick next topic until maxDepth or timeLimit, then synthesize a report. Async job, Redis-streamed activities+sources; reuses the search+scrape path.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/research-automation/study/deep-research-loop--from-firecrawl.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/research-automation/build/deep-research-loop--from-firecrawl.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl)

- **Agentic Research Planning** — from scira. Two-phase deep research: a cheap model produces a structured plan (1-5 topics x 3-5 todos), then a capable model runs an autonomous agent up to 75 steps with search/browse/code/file tools, all inside one outer tool call. Outer chat loop capped at 5 steps.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/research-automation/study/agentic-research-planning--from-scira.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/research-automation/build/agentic-research-planning--from-scira.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/zaidmukaddam/scira)

- **Engagement Signal Ranking** — from last30days-skill. Two-stage: RRF (k=60, topic-sensitive source_weights) then LLM rerank of top-N. Quality nudge detects degraded sources via domain diversity + snippet density. All inputs from pipeline Report.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/research-automation/study/engagement-signal-ranking--from-last30days-skill.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/research-automation/build/engagement-signal-ranking--from-last30days-skill.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/mvanhorn/last30days-skill)

- **Entity Resolution** — from last30days-skill. 4 parallel searches resolve topic → {subreddits, handles, repos, context}. X handles get 3× URL weight. GitHub -action canonicalization. News context capped at 300 chars for LLM injection.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/research-automation/study/entity-resolution--from-last30days-skill.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/research-automation/build/entity-resolution--from-last30days-skill.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/mvanhorn/last30days-skill)

- **Search-Driven Scraping** — from scrapegraph-ai. Question-only research: LLM rewrites prompt -> web search (DuckDuckGo default / Serper) -> scrape top-N with full SmartScraper -> merge per-page answers. A node runs other graphs (the real parallelism). Returns considered_urls for citations.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/research-automation/study/search-driven-scraping--from-scrapegraph-ai.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/research-automation/build/search-driven-scraping--from-scrapegraph-ai.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/ScrapeGraphAI/Scrapegraph-ai)

### Code Generation (5)
Using an LLM to write runnable code as the deliverable, rather than to produce data directly. The model's output is a program — typically to be executed afterward — that does the actual work.

- **Scraper Code Generation** — from llm-scraper. generate() asks LLM to write a self-contained IIFE JS scraper for page+schema instead of extracting. Plain generateText (schema as context, not constraint). stripMarkdownBackticks cleans fences. Amortizes AI cost across runs.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/code-generation/study/scraper-code-generation--from-llm-scraper.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/code-generation/build/scraper-code-generation--from-llm-scraper.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/mishushakov/llm-scraper)

- **Interview-Driven App Scaffolding** — from whatsapp-agentkit. The product IS a prompt: CLAUDE.md + a /build-agent slash command drive a 5-phase, phase-gated flow (verify env, 10-question interview, generate the full app from inline templates parameterized by answers, local test, deploy). Generates only the chosen variant. No code ships; the app materializes when the LLM runs the recipe.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/code-generation/study/interview-driven-scaffolding--from-whatsapp-agentkit.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/code-generation/build/interview-driven-scaffolding--from-whatsapp-agentkit.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/Hainrixz/whatsapp-agentkit)

- **Connector Builder Test-Read** — from airbyte. Backend for the no-code builder: run a bounded, instrumented test read of an in-progress manifest with the SAME production engine, capped by TestLimits{max_records,max_pages_per_slice,max_slices}, capturing every HTTP request/response grouped by slice/page + inferred schema, returned as a StreamRead wrapped in a protocol RECORD. Plus resolve/full-resolve manifest.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/code-generation/study/connector-builder-test-read--from-airbyte.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/code-generation/build/connector-builder-test-read--from-airbyte.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/airbytehq/airbyte)

- **Artifact Code Generation** — from bolt-diy. StreamingMessageParser state machine extracts <boltArtifact>/<boltAction> XML tags from LLM output stream and fires callbacks on open/stream/close. File actions write to WebContainer, shell actions spawn processes. Strips markdown fences. Handles mid-response token limit continuations.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/code-generation/study/artifact-code-generation--from-bolt-diy.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/code-generation/build/artifact-code-generation--from-bolt-diy.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/stackblitz-labs/bolt.diy)

- **Component Specification Generation** — from ai-website-cloner-template. Generates structured Markdown spec documents per page section with: exact oklch colors, px typography values, interaction state diffs, responsive layout changes, public/ asset paths, and real content samples. Spec quality determines AI builder output quality. Stored in docs/research/components/.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/code-generation/study/component-spec-generation--from-ai-website-cloner-template.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/code-generation/build/component-spec-generation--from-ai-website-cloner-template.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template)

### Infrastructure (5)
local-first data storage, desktop app integration, AI provider routing, and credential management. Covers SQLite persistence, Electron IPC, HTTP/SSE daemon architecture, and bring-your-own-key proxy patterns.

- **Local-First Architecture** — from open-design. 3-process: Electron main + Node.js Hono daemon + Next.js web UI. SQLite via better-sqlite3 (synchronous). Project files in ~/.od/projects/<id>/. Sidecar IPC: STATUS/EVAL/SCREENSHOT/CONSOLE/CLICK/SHUTDOWN. Optional S3 backend + Docker deployment.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/infrastructure/study/local-first-architecture--from-open-design.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/infrastructure/build/local-first-architecture--from-open-design.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/nexu-io/open-design)

- **BYOK + Rate-Limited AI Action** — from carousel-generator. Next.js server action fronting an AI call with 3 gates: server key present -> optional per-IP Upstash slidingWindow(10,'15m') rate limit (opt-in by env) -> forward. Parallel client BYOK key hook. Zero-database throttling.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/infrastructure/study/byok-rate-limited-action--from-carousel-generator.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/infrastructure/build/byok-rate-limited-action--from-carousel-generator.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/FranciscoMoretti/carousel-generator)

- **BYOK Proxy** — from open-design. POST /api/proxy/{anthropic,openai,azure,google,ollama,senseaudio}/stream. API key in request body. SSE response: start/delta/error/end events. SSRF protection blocks RFC1918, link-local, CGNAT. Azure needs apiVersion field.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/infrastructure/study/byok-proxy--from-open-design.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/infrastructure/build/byok-proxy--from-open-design.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/nexu-io/open-design)

- **Modular Per-Permission Packaging** — from permissionskit. Hub-and-spoke Swift packaging: 15+ per-permission SPM products/CocoaPods subspecs over one core, each gated by a -D compile flag, so consumers compile in only what they use and never reference sensitive Apple APIs they don't need (App Review surface reduction).
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/infrastructure/study/modular-permission-packaging--from-permissionskit.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/infrastructure/build/modular-permission-packaging--from-permissionskit.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/sparrowcode/PermissionsKit)

- **Async-to-Sync Status Bridging** — from permissionskit. DispatchSemaphore (and static-anchor delegate) pattern that exposes a synchronous status getter over Apple's callback/delegate-only authorization APIs; the deadlock-safe async-to-sync bridge.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/infrastructure/study/async-to-sync-status-bridging--from-permissionskit.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/infrastructure/build/async-to-sync-status-bridging--from-permissionskit.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/sparrowcode/PermissionsKit)

### Rendering (5)
How a product turns its data model into pixels — and the visual identity that comes with it.

- **Hand-Drawn Rendering** — from excalidraw. Rough.js sketchy shapes with a FROZEN per-element seed fed into Rough every render so the wobble is deterministic (no shimmer on move/zoom/reload). Size-aware roughness, hand-built SVG-path rounded corners, disableMultiStroke for dashed, WeakMap shape cache keyed on versionNonce. Freedraw via perfect-freehand.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/rendering/study/hand-drawn-rendering--from-excalidraw.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/rendering/build/hand-drawn-rendering--from-excalidraw.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw)

- **DOM-to-PDF Export** — from carousel-generator. Export a live React view as a multi-page PDF: deep-clone node, strip editor chrome by id-prefix, re-inline fonts, proxy cross-origin imgs same-origin, html-to-image rasterize at 1.8x, slice tall canvas into 400x500 jsPDF pages. Reuses react-to-print clone plumbing.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/rendering/study/dom-to-pdf-export--from-carousel-generator.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/rendering/build/dom-to-pdf-export--from-carousel-generator.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/FranciscoMoretti/carousel-generator)

- **WASM/Skia Render Engine** — from penpot. Rust->WASM (Emscripten) renderer on Skia drawing to one GPU canvas. C-ABI boundary (numbers+pointers only): 'current shape + setters' turtle API plus packed fixed-size binary records in shared linear memory (28-byte path segs, 160-byte fills; alloc->write->read->free). Tile-based incremental rendering with a frame-spread loop.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/rendering/study/wasm-skia-render-engine--from-penpot.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/rendering/build/wasm-skia-render-engine--from-penpot.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/penpot/penpot)

- **Visualization Auto-Selection** — from metabase. A frontend registry of chart types where each visualization self-describes applicability: getSensibleDisplays(data) filters the registry by each viz's isSensible(data); the chosen one's checkRenderable validates with a user-facing reason; renders with column remapping (FK id->label) and multi-series transforms. New charts plug in by registering and answering the same predicates.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/rendering/study/visualization-auto-selection--from-metabase.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/rendering/build/visualization-auto-selection--from-metabase.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/metabase/metabase)

- **Notch-Anchored Companion Overlay** — from clicky. A menu-bar-only macOS app with two transparent surfaces: a borderless NSPanel that drops out of the menu-bar/notch strip beneath an NSStatusItem, and a per-screen full-screen click-through OverlayWindow at .screenSaver level using .ignoresSafeArea() to draw a cursor-following companion over the whole display incl. the notch. No safeAreaInsets API — the notch effect is anchoring + ignoring safe area.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/rendering/study/notch-anchored-companion-overlay--from-clicky.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/rendering/build/notch-anchored-companion-overlay--from-clicky.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/farzaa/clicky)

### Structured Extraction (5)
Turning unstructured content (a webpage, a document, a blob of text) into typed, schema-validated data using an LLM as the extraction engine.

- **Schema-Driven Extraction** — from llm-scraper. Playwright page + Zod/JSON schema → typed object. Preprocess page, then AI SDK generateText with schema as `output` constraint, read result.output. Schema is both TS type and runtime constraint. One method: run(). No retry loop.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/structured-extraction/study/schema-driven-extraction--from-llm-scraper.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/structured-extraction/build/schema-driven-extraction--from-llm-scraper.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/mishushakov/llm-scraper)

- **LLM Extract (map-reduce)** — from firecrawl. Prompt+schema+URL(s)/domain -> one structured object via an async map-reduce job: analyzeSchemaAndPrompt decides single-answer vs multi-entity, spreadSchemas splits the schema, docs chunked x50 and batch-extracted concurrently, null-aware merge + dedup + rerank, then merged. Redis-backed status steps.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/structured-extraction/study/llm-extract-map-reduce--from-firecrawl.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/structured-extraction/build/llm-extract-map-reduce--from-firecrawl.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl)

- **Map-Reduce Answer Generation** — from scrapegraph-ai. Big-page extraction: 1 chunk -> single LLM call; N chunks -> parallel per-chunk calls (RunnableParallel) + a merge call. Pydantic/JSON output, 'NA' not-found sentinel, no-```json rule. Failures degrade to {error, raw_response} data.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/structured-extraction/study/map-reduce-answer-generation--from-scrapegraph-ai.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/structured-extraction/build/map-reduce-answer-generation--from-scrapegraph-ai.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/ScrapeGraphAI/Scrapegraph-ai)

- **Streaming Partial Objects** — from llm-scraper. stream() variant: AI SDK streamText with schema output → partialOutputStream async iterable. Each emission is a schema-conformant partial; last is complete. Mirror of run() but returns {stream,url}. For responsive UIs.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/structured-extraction/study/streaming-partial-objects--from-llm-scraper.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/structured-extraction/build/streaming-partial-objects--from-llm-scraper.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/mishushakov/llm-scraper)

- **Grounded Retrieval + Inline Citations** — from scira. Inline [text](url) citations with NO post-processor: retrieval tools return {url,title,content}, the model gets them raw, and a strict system-prompt rule block makes it cite inline. Plus domain dedup, provider fallback chain, and content truncation.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/structured-extraction/study/grounded-retrieval-citations--from-scira.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/structured-extraction/build/grounded-retrieval-citations--from-scira.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/zaidmukaddam/scira)

### Tts (5)
on-device / local text-to-speech — turning text into a speech waveform without a cloud API.

- **Audio Overview (TTS)** — from openpaper. Spoken 'audio overview' of a paper or project: LLM writes a length-targeted podcast-style script with [^n] citations, markers stripped, chunked at ~10k chars, synthesized via Azure OpenAI gpt-4o-mini-tts, concatenated to one WAV (custom RIFF writer), stored in S3. FastAPI BackgroundTask + poll + presigned URL.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/tts/study/audio-overview-tts--from-openpaper.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/tts/build/audio-overview-tts--from-openpaper.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/khoj-ai/openpaper)

- **ONNX TTS Pipeline** — from supertonic. On-device TTS as four chained ONNX models: duration_predictor -> text_encoder -> vector_estimator (flow-matching, looped) -> vocoder. Unicode-code-point tokenizer covers 31 languages; voice is a small style JSON; outputs 44.1kHz WAV, no GPU.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/tts/study/onnx-tts-pipeline--from-supertonic.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/tts/build/onnx-tts-pipeline--from-supertonic.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/supertone-inc/supertonic)

- **Flow-Matching Sampler** — from supertonic. Generative core: iteratively denoise a gaussian latent into a speech latent via vector_estimator.onnx, called total_steps times (5-12, default 8). current_step/total_step are tensor inputs, giving a runtime quality/latency dial without retraining. Length-Aware RoPE keeps text<->speech aligned.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/tts/study/flow-matching-sampler--from-supertonic.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/tts/build/flow-matching-sampler--from-supertonic.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/supertone-inc/supertonic)

- **Expression Tags** — from supertonic. Inline prosody control via ~10 closed-vocabulary text tags (<laugh>, <breath>, <sigh>). Recognized in the text front-end and mapped to reserved token ids, so they flow through every stage as ordinary tokens and the trained models render them as acoustic events. No DSP, no reference audio.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/tts/study/expression-tags--from-supertonic.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/tts/build/expression-tags--from-supertonic.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/supertone-inc/supertonic)

- **ElevenLabs Streaming TTS** — from clicky. A @MainActor Swift client that POSTs reply text to a Cloudflare Worker /tts proxy (eleven_flash_v2_5, stability 0.5 / similarity_boost 0.75), receives MP3 as one Data blob, and plays it via a retained AVAudioPlayer. Despite the name, playback is whole-response/buffered with no per-sentence chunking; voice id lives on the proxy.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/tts/study/elevenlabs-streaming-tts--from-clicky.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/tts/build/elevenlabs-streaming-tts--from-clicky.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/farzaa/clicky)

### Ai Workflow (4)
Orchestration systems that turn user intent into multi-step agent-driven execution pipelines. Covers iterative design loops, agent CLI detection and spawning, streaming output into sandboxed previews, and convergence mechanics.

- **Agentic Loop** — from open-design. 3-stage linear pipeline (plan→generate→critique) in a single agent conversation thread. Critique Theater: 5-panelist jury (Designer/Critic/Brand/A11Y/Copy) with convergence enforcement. Iteration ceiling via OD_MAX_DEVLOOP_ITERATIONS.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-workflow/study/agentic-loop--from-open-design.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-workflow/build/agentic-loop--from-open-design.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/nexu-io/open-design)

- **Silent AI Text Transform** — from asyar. global hotkey triggers background LLM call without opening the launcher UI; reads from OS selection/clipboard/typed/none, runs privacy redaction, sends single buffered LLM call, writes to accessibility replace/clipboard/paste/HUD; per-command provider/model override
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-workflow/study/silent-ai-text-transform--from-asyar.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-workflow/build/silent-ai-text-transform--from-asyar.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/Xoshbin/asyar)

- **Agent CLI Integration** — from open-design. Dual-mode od CLI: default starts daemon+UI, subcommands are thin HTTP clients. PATH scan detects 22+ agent CLIs. Agents run as child processes, stdout relayed via SSE. Recoverable exit codes 64-75. MCP OAuth daemon-hosted.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-workflow/study/agent-cli-integration--from-open-design.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-workflow/build/agent-cli-integration--from-open-design.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/nexu-io/open-design)

- **Chat-Completion Middleware** — from open-webui. One ordered async pipeline every chat completion flows through: process_chat_payload mutates a shared form_data in fixed order (pipeline/filter inlet -> memory -> web search -> image gen -> code interpreter -> tools -> files), then model call + stream, then process_chat_response runs outlet filters + background title/tag/follow-up tasks. Central fork: native FC exposes capabilities as tool specs vs non-native prompt-injection + a separate task-model tool-selection call. Server/MCP/terminal/client/builtin tools merge into one tools_dict; extra_params is the DI bundle; sources side-channel for citations.
  [study](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-workflow/study/chat-completion-middleware--from-open-webui.md) · [build spec](https://github.com/derrick-ships/distill-it/blob/main/features/ai-workflow/build/chat-completion-middleware--from-open-webui.md) · [origin repo](https://github.com/open-webui/open-webui)

### Codegen (4)
Systems that generate design artifacts — HTML prototypes, presentation decks, images, and videos — from natural language prompts via AI models.

- **AI Chat Stream** — from dyad. Multi-provider LLM streaming chat via Vercel AI SDK.
